segments.voice_english: A young boy stepped onto the pitch for Barcelona and stunned the entire football world.

segments.voice_english: That boy was Lamine Yamal Nasraoui Ebana, and he quickly became a key right winger.
segments.subtitle_english: That boy was Lamine Yamal Nasraoui Ebana, and he quickly became a key right winger.
segments.voice_hindi: वह लड़का लैमिन यमल नसरौई इबाना था, और वह जल्द ही एक प्रमुख दक्षिणपंथी बन गया।

segments.voice_english: Now experts call him one of the best players, so is he the world's greatest?

segments.voice_hindi: वह प्रदर्शन शानदार था, लेकिन अन्य लोगों का तर्क है कि मेस्सी बनाम रोनाल्डो प्रतिद्वंद्विता फुटबॉल चर्चा को बर्बाद कर देती है।

segments.subtitle_english: The debate intensified after pundits questioned if legends like Messi receive unfair preferential treatment today.
